mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay_repayment_order (created_at, updated_at, biz_repay_no, loan_no, channel_code, channel_serial_no, amount, payer_id, payer_account, status, fail_reason, retry_count) VALUES (#{createdAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{bizRepayNo}, #{loanNo}, #{channelCode}, #{channelSerialNo}, #{amount}, #{payerId}, #{payerAccount}, #{status}, #{failReason}, #{retryCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay_repayment_order WHERE loan_no = #{loanNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC
